title: Der Rat der Götter
writer: Philipp Gecht, Richard Sasuly, Friedrich Wolf
actors: Paul Bildt, Fritz Tillmann, Willy A. Kleinau
plot: Based on the 1947 book "I.G. Farben", by American author Richard Sasuly, and records from the Nuremberg Trial of the chemical giant I.G. Farben, Council of the Gods is a story about the collaboration between international corporat...
